explanation: The phrase "the sensor data is not good" maps to the negation of the atomic proposition "good", i.e. !good. "Shall change states" implies an eventual (F) transition, and "from NOMINAL to MANEUVER" translates to the conjunction of the atomic propositions "state_is_NOMINAL" and "state_is_MANEUVER". The final LTL formula is G(state_is_NOMINAL -> F(state_is_MANEUVER & !good)).

explanation_dict.natural_language: The sensor data is not good
